claims.claim: Per-partition routing incurs a throughput reduction of 0.33–0.51× relative to a single global student.

evidence_refs.quote: We investigate whether a cascade system that distills a teacher model into partition-specific cheap students, with per-partition fallback thresholds, can outperform a single globally distilled student with a global fallback gate at matched teacher-call budgets.
